title: Chicken Jockey
description: This mod makes 15% of zombies and skeletons seek mobs to ride like spiders, chickens etc.
body:
#
Chicken Jockey

This mod makes it so that 15% of skeletons and baby zombies actively search for a mob to ride. **Skeletons, Strays, Boggeds, and Wither Skeletons** search for **a Spider** or **a Cave Spider to ride.** **Baby Zombies, Husks, Drowneds, Zombie Villagers** search for **Chickens, Pigs, Cows, Sheep, adult Zombies, Spiders, Ocelots, Pandas, Horses, Untamed Cats** and **Untamed Wolfs.**
